name: Pork Piccata
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice pork into 3/4-inch slices and pound to 1/4-inch thickness.
2. Spread pork generously with 1/4 cup salad dressing.
3. Combine bread crumbs and cheese. Coat the pork with the crumb mixture.
4. Melt margarine in a pan. Add garlic; cook until tender. Reduce heat.
5. Add pork; cook until meat is no longer pink.
6. Combine remaining salad dressing, milk, capers, and lemon juice; mix well.
7. Serve with pork and your favorite accompaniments. Makes 4 servings.
